name: Standards Check on Write
description: Before writing any source file, verify the change follows project coding standards — JSDoc, explicit types, no implicit any, correct import paths.

then.prompt: Before writing this file, verify the content you're about to write follows the Intent Drift coding standards from .kiro/steering/instructions.md: JSDoc on every function, Swagger annotations on every route, no implicit `any`, explicit return types, `.js` extensions on local imports, AppError for error handling, named exports not default classes. If the content violates any standard, fix it before writing.
